title: priority + doc-order selection
manager: The rule for which enabled transition is selected when several compete: explicit priority first, then document order as the deterministic tiebreak. This is what makes a machine's choice among simultaneously-enabled transitions predictable and reproducible instead of implementation-defined — the same source picks the same transition on every host, which is a precondition for replay meaning anything.
cs: transition selection by explicit priority then document order; deterministic; part of the macrostep (W6.71); interacts with the edge resolution order (W6.89).
